title: haplophyllum buxbaumii
intro: Haplophyllum buxbaumii, also known as Rock Spurge, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Haplophyllum buxbaumii include relief from pain, fever reduction, and treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
